title: mentha × verticillata f. hardeggensis
intro: Mentha × verticillata f. hardeggensis, also known as Hard Egg Mint, is a variety of mint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil which contains menthone and menthyl acetate, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and relieve stress. The health benefits of Hard Egg Mint include its ability to alleviate nausea and vomiting, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health, making it a valuable herb for those suffering from colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Hard Egg Mint is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can also be used in cooking and as a natural breath freshener.
